name: tracer
summary: Cross-cutting trace context for the signal loop: one traceId per signal, one spanId per hop (linked to its parent), plus the four-tuple (session·run·call·branch). Lets a single action be followed end-to-end as one trace. Pure, zero-dependency, deterministic-friendly (id/clock injectable).

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

input.description: A parent context (or none) and a hop name.

output.description: A trace/span context and stamped rows.

provenanceMapping.run: per-session today; per-tool-call when capture goes per-tool
provenanceMapping.branch: git branch of the working tree

invariants: A span always carries the traceId of its context (one trace per signal).
A child span links to its parent (parentSpanId), so hops form a chain.
span() refuses a context with no traceId — no untraced (ghost) hop.
Pure: no reads, no writes, no hidden state; id and clock are injectable for determinism.
